resources.string: In Front Desk, open Settings → Paired devices, generate a code, and copy the pairing string. Paste it below (QR scanning is coming soon).
Paste the copied pairing string here
That doesn\'t look like a pairing string. Copy it again from Front Desk → Settings → Paired devices.
Invalid or expired pairing code. Generate a new one in Front Desk and paste the fresh string.
This device will stop monitoring %1$s and its token will be revoked. You can pair again anytime with a new code.

This device is still linked and nothing was revoked. Check your connection and try again. You can unlink here anyway, but Front Desk may still list this device, so revoke it from Front Desk → Settings → Paired devices.
